topics.title: Present Simple for Routines
topics.explanation: We use the present simple for things we do regularly. Add "-s" for he/she/it: I play → she plays.
topics.explanationAr: نستخدم المضارع البسيط للأشياء التي نفعلها بانتظام. نضيف "-s" مع he/she/it.

examples.en: I brush my teeth every morning.
She goes to school by bus.
We eat dinner at seven o'clock.
He doesn't like vegetables.

topics.title: Prepositions of Time
topics.explanation: Use "at" for exact times, "on" for days and dates, and "in" for months, years, and longer periods.
topics.explanationAr: استخدم "at" للأوقات المحددة، و"on" للأيام والتواريخ، و"in" للشهور والسنوات.

examples.en: My class starts at nine o'clock.
We visit our grandparents on Fridays.
My birthday is in July.
I was born in 2016.

topics.title: Adverbs of Frequency
topics.explanation: Words like always, usually, sometimes, and never tell us how often something happens. They usually go before the main verb.
topics.explanationAr: كلمات مثل always وusually وsometimes وnever تخبرنا عن مدى تكرار حدوث شيء ما.

examples.en: I always eat breakfast before school.
She usually walks to school.
We sometimes watch movies on weekends.
examples.ar: أحيانًا نشاهد الأفلام في نهاية الأسبوع.

examples.en: He never eats fast food.
examples.ar: هو لا يأكل الوجبات السريعة أبدًا.

topics.title: Object Pronouns
topics.explanation: We use me, you, him, her, it, us, and them after a verb or preposition, instead of repeating a noun.
topics.explanationAr: نستخدم me وyou وhim وher وit وus وthem بعد الفعل أو حرف الجر بدلًا من تكرار الاسم.

examples.en: I saw him at the park yesterday.
Can you help me, please?
My mom bought it for us.
I like them very much.

topics.title: Some / Any
topics.explanation: We use "some" in positive sentences, and "any" in questions and negative sentences.
topics.explanationAr: نستخدم "some" في الجمل المثبتة، و"any" في الأسئلة والجمل المنفية.

examples.en: I have some apples in my bag.
Do you have any homework today?
There isn't any sugar in the kitchen.
Would you like some water?

topics.title: Superlatives (the biggest, the best)
topics.explanation: We use superlatives to compare three or more things. Short words add "-est": big → the biggest. Longer words use "the most".
topics.explanationAr: نستخدم صيغة التفضيل لمقارنة ثلاثة أشياء أو أكثر.

examples.en: This is the biggest elephant in the zoo.
examples.ar: هذا أكبر فيل في حديقة الحيوان.

examples.en: She is the tallest girl in our class.
This is the most beautiful painting I've seen.
That was the easiest test ever!
examples.ar: كان هذا أسهل اختبار على الإطلاق!

topics.title: Present Simple Questions (Do / Does)
topics.explanation: We use "do" for I/you/we/they and "does" for he/she/it to make present simple questions.
topics.explanationAr: نستخدم "do" مع I/you/we/they و"does" مع he/she/it لتكوين أسئلة المضارع البسيط.

examples.en: Do you like pizza?
Does she play the piano?
Where do you live?
What does he do after school?

topics.title: Imperatives (Commands)
topics.explanation: We use the base form of the verb (without "to") to give instructions or commands. Add "don't" for negative commands.
topics.explanationAr: نستخدم الفعل بدون "to" لإعطاء تعليمات أو أوامر. نضيف "don't" للأمر السلبي.

examples.en: Sit down, please.
Close the door.
Don't run in the classroom.
Please be quiet during the exam.
examples.ar: من فضلك التزم الهدوء أثناء الاختبار.
